zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellen DeUrswick於1364年出生在英國藍卡爾格亞特 武爾斯維其可時，她的父親Sir Thomas Urswick of Badsworth32歲，母親Lady Johanna de Hertforth19歲。她於1388年與Richard Molyneux在英國英格蘭藍卡爾澤福頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1459年在英國藍卡爾澤福頓享年95歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾澤福頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellen DeUrswick于1364年出生在英国藍卡爾格亞特 武爾斯維其可时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Urswick of Badsworth32岁，母亲Lady Johanna de Hertforth19岁。她于1388年与Richard Molyneux在英国英格兰藍卡爾澤福頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1459年在英国藍卡爾澤福頓享年95岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾澤福頓。

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Ellen DeUrswick was born in 1364, in Great Urswick, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir Thomas Urswick of Badsworth, was 32 and her mother, Lady Johanna de Hertforth, was 19. She married Richard Molyneux in 1388, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1459, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 95, and was buried in Sefton, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellen DeUrswick est née en 1364, à Great Urswick, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Urswick of Badsworth, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lady Johanna de Hertforth, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Molyneux en 1388, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1459, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 95 ans, et a été enterrée à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre.

Sie hat 1388 in Sefton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Richard Molyneux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1459 im Alter von 95 Jahren in Sefton, Lancashire, England und wurde in Sefton, Lancashire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Richard Molyneux nel 1388, nel Sefton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1459, nel Sefton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 95 anni, e fu sepolta a Sefton, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellen DeUrswickが1364年にイギリスランカシュアイアグレアト ウルスウィックで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Urswick of Badsworthは32歳，母Lady Johanna de Hertforthは19歳であった。1388年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンでRichard Molyneuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1459年にイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンで95歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアセフトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen DeUrswick(이)가 1364년 영국 랭카실르 그리트 르스윅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Urswick of Badsworth(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Johanna de Hertforth(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1388년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 세프턴에서 Richard Molyneux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1459년 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에서 95세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen DeUrswick nasceu em 1364, em Great Urswick, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Urswick of Badsworth, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Lady Johanna de Hertforth, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Molyneux em 1388, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1459, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 95 anos, e foi sepultada em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.St Michael on Wyre, Lancashire, England: ст мачаел'с он вир, ланкашир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellen DeUrswick родилась в 1364 г. в местности грит урсвикк, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Urswick of Badsworth было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Johanna de Hertforth, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Molyneux в 1388 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1459 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 95 лет и была похоронена в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ellen DeUrswick nació en 1364, en Great Urswick, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Urswick of Badsworth, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Lady Johanna de Hertforth, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Richard Molyneux en 1388, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1459, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 95 años, y fue sepultada en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
